articles.title: 92% of Coinbase Users Trading Shiba Inu are Buying $SHIB, Exchange’s Data Shows
articles.description: Data from the Nasdaq-listed cryptocurrency exchange Coinbase shows that 92% of the platform’s users who are trading the meme-inspired cryptocurrency Shiba Inu ($SHIB) are buying, amid an ongoing accumulation trend that has seen the price of SHIB hold relatively well over the past 30 days. articles.title: Celsius repays $120 million stablecoin debt to Maker protocol
articles.description: Celsius Network pulled its bitcoin liquidation price below $5,000 by repaying a total sum of $120 million to Maker today.

articles.title: KuCoin CEO Addresses FUD, Says Crypto Exchange Has Zero Plans To Halt Withdrawals
articles.description: The chief executive officer of crypto exchange KuCoin is addressing the fear and uncertainty surrounding the platform and says that the company has no plans to halt its withdrawal services.
